title: Flow of a Deep Learning Application for Image-Based Review Analysis
description: This flowchart illustrates the end-to-end process of a deep learning system designed to analyze product review images (e.g., identifying products, reading handwritten ratings, and detecting sentiment from pictures). It showcases the key components from data ingestion to final actionable insight.
elements: Output/Insight (Structured Data: Product ID, Rating, Sentiment)
relationships: Input is processed by Preprocessing Module
Preprocessed image feeds into CNN Feature Extractor
CNN features are used by parallel Classification and Regression Heads
